# Project Governance & Workflows

## 📂 Versioning & Branching
- **`main`**: Current stable release (V4.1).
- **`v5-vision`**: Incubation branch for Agentic Swarm prototype (Planned).
- **`legacy/v1`**: Documentation and historical context.

## 📅 Project Board (Board Simulation)
We use a structured [task.md](../../brain/task.md) as our dynamic project board. 

### Current Milestone: V5.0 Transition
- [ ] Implement Swarm Logic Hub (Economic vs Plant Protec)
- [ ] Add Dosage Savings Calculator UI
- [ ] Finalize White Paper V2.0 (Agentic Edition)

## 🐛 Issues & Contributions
- Use `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE` (To be added) for defect reports.
- All PRs must include a "Vision Alignment" check to ensure they don't break the "Agentic Decision OS" paradigm.
